message:
🌱 Add distribution: proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input` mission (#2110)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "distribution-4478-proxy-panic-unexpected-end-of-json-input",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "distribution: proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`",
+    "description": "proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current distribution deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your distribution version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nhelm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working distribution installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review distribution configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution\n```\ntl;dr: This issue is a reopen of https://github.com/distribution/distribution/issues/2374 with more insights. In https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4293 we fixed the predominant root cause for the issue - the non-graceful shutdown."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`",
+        "description": "I am closing this issue as it _appears_ to be fixed in [3.1.0](https://github.com/distribution/distribution) with https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4624.\nI will reopen if we observe it again with 3.1.0.\n```yaml\n# ...\n2024-10-03 15:43:54\ttime=\"2024-10-03T15:43:54.749227425Z\" level=info msg=\"stopping server gracefully. Draining connections for 25s\" go.version=go1.22.4 instance.id=5731de6f-05af-43a1-b44b-a3c1bf25e067 service=registry version=3.0.0-beta.1\n2024-10-03 15:43:54\ttime=\"2024-10-03T15:43:54.750578013Z\" level=fatal msg=\"error writing scheduler state: filesystem: write /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json: no space left on device\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"proxy: `panic: unexpected end of JSON input`\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I am closing this issue as it _appears_ to be fixed in [3.1.0](https://github.com/distribution/distribution) with https://github.com/distribution/distribution/pull/4624.\nI will reopen if we observe it again with 3.1.0.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# ...\n2024-10-03 15:43:54\ttime=\"2024-10-03T15:43:54.749227425Z\" level=info msg=\"stopping server gracefully. Draining connections for 25s\" go.version=go1.22.4 instance.id=5731de6f-05af-43a1-b44b-a3c1bf25e067 service=registry version=3.0.0-beta.1\n2024-10-03 15:43:54\ttime=\"2024-10-03T15:43:54.750578013Z\" level=fatal msg=\"error writing scheduler state: filesystem: write /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json: no space left on device\"",
+        "$ ls -la /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json\n-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 0 Oct  3 15:43 /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json\n\n$ cat /var/lib/registry/scheduler-state.json"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
